required: Video link is direct and unlisted

items.title: Scaffold implementation records
items.description: Create task-log and Ralph sprint records for the approved OpenAI MCP video work before implementation begins.
acceptanceCriteria: Sprint launch commands are documented in prompt.md

items.title: Add unlisted approval video asset
items.description: Copy the local CapCut MP4 into the website public directory under an approval-only path without creating a public page.
acceptanceCriteria: No navigation, homepage, footer, sitemap, or public page links to the MP4

items.title: Add no-index controls
items.description: Add robots and response header controls for the approval-only asset path.
acceptanceCriteria: next.config.ts applies X-Robots-Tag noindex, nofollow, noarchive to /openai-approval/:path*
sitemap.ts remains free of approval video URLs

items.title: Verify direct link and build
items.description: Run project checks and verify the direct file path is available locally without surfacing in public discovery routes.
acceptanceCriteria: A local HTTP check confirms /openai-approval/barrelbook-chatgpt-mcp-demo.mp4 is served as video/mp4
Sitemap and robots checks confirm the intended discovery behavior

items.title: Prepare shareable deployment
items.description: Commit scoped changes and push the branch so a Vercel preview or production deployment can expose the approval link.
acceptanceCriteria: Only scoped files are staged and committed
Branch codex/openai-mcp-video is pushed to origin
Final response includes the direct path to share after deployment
